chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-2034 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ For Order as to maintainability of Petition. 06.02.2026. Mr. Maimoona Nasreen, Advocate for the Petitioner --------------- Learned counsel states on instructions that this Petition is not being pressed any further. In view of such statement, the Petition stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
